sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: apply f=0.744 as fractional position multiplier across multiple trades to compound geometric mean returns (HPR) into terminal wealth ratio (TWR). Max historical drawdown tolerance: -4899.57

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by optimal f value, which when applied across multiple trades produces a geometric mean return (HPR) that compounds to achieve expected terminal wealth ratio.
